1768160.name: Herency
1768160.description:
Herency is a cooperative survival game for 1-4 players. Grandma died and something happened at the family meal, run away from the killer and find a way to escape and take the inheritance with you.

Will you be able to take the inheritance with you?

.
  • 1-4 player cooperative mode.
    Take control as one of the four surviving family members in a cooperative experience where you must work together to escape the house.

  • Proximity voice chat
    To make the experience more immersive and hear the agonizing screams of your "friends", use our positional voice chat.

  • Single player mode
    For veteran players only. In this game mode, you will scream for yourself.

  • Scalable difficulty
    The pursuer's anger increases as the game progresses.

  • Rejugabilidad
    Locked doors, access keys and inheritance locations are always randomized in each game, making you reconsider your decisions..



Warning
This game contains flashing lights that may cause problems for people with epilepsy or other photosensitive condition.
1768160.supported_languages:
英语*, 西班牙语 - 西班牙
*具有完全音频支持的语言
